title: Density
description: Adds new and unique compact storage blocks!
body:
> # Density
### A mod about unique compact storage blocks
![A marketplace full of blocks from the mod, with the mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6017878bc8cfc77bb061060ee680868d6a10f6ea.png)

<center>

### Join our discord to stay up to date with mod updates, teasers, and more! (click)
[![Discord banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cea9cd7dc8511b56c21d5eef30b040a9f9f81d2.png)](https://discord.gg/mEYDh4SUWN)

(Report bugs on the [CurseForge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/density) or the discord server)
</center>

### || BLOCKS

- Rotten Flesh Block
- Bone Column
- Stick Pile
- Spider Eye Block
- String Block
- Flint Block
- Stack of Bricks
- Stack of Nether Bricks
- Compressed Block of Quartz
- Leather Block
- Charcoal Block
- Packed Wheat Seeds
- Packed Beetroot Seeds
- Beef Chunk
- Pork Chunk
- Steak Chunk
- Cooked Pork Chunk
- Cod Pile
- Salmon Pile
- Golden Carrot Pile
- Blaze Rod Column (Emits average amounts of light)
- Stack of Books (Affected by gravity)
- Stack of Papers (Affected by gravity
- Sugar Pile (Affected by gravity)
- Glowstone Pile (Affected by gravity, emits large amounts of light)
- Gunpowder Pile (Affected by gravity, and can explode by lighting it with a flint and steel)

![Several piles of blocks from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bcf217230633d4877b8588ba966e9af52dcc6ed.png)

### || Q&A

>Q: Can you port to [x] version/modloader?

A: Probably not.

>Q: Can i port this mod to [x] version/modloader?

A: Sure, as long as it's on CurseForge/Modrinth and credits me on the mod page.

> Q: Can i use this in my modpack?

A: If it's on CurseForge or Modrinth, sure!

<center>
